content.text:
Done. Two changes made to `/home/mega/OMEGA_WORKSPACE/CANON/OmegA-Architecture/web/src/app/tranquility/page.module.css`:

1. Added `.stateThinking` as a full duplicate of `.stateProcessing` (all three nested rules: `.omegaGlow`, `.innerRing`, `.omegaSymbol`) immediately after the existing `.stateProcessing` block.

2. Added `.stateFollowup` and `.stateError` blocks (with `.omegaGlow` and `.omegaSymbol` rules each) immediately after `.stateSpeaking`, before the animations section. Nothing else was touched.
